evals.prompt: validate the markdown file at skills/markdownlint/evals/test-doc.md using the markdownlint skill
evals.expected_output: Report showing markdown formatting errors with rule IDs and fixes
expectations: Output references MD rule IDs (MD018, MD022, MD047, MD004, or similar)
Output mentions the specific file test-doc.md with errors
Output suggests --fix flag or provides manual correction guidance

evals.prompt: fix the markdown formatting issues in skills/markdownlint/evals/test-doc.md using the markdownlint skill
evals.expected_output: Auto-fix applied, remaining manual fixes reported
expectations: Output shows markdownlint --fix was run or files were edited to fix issues
Output reports issues that cannot be auto-fixed or confirms all issues resolved
Output re-validates after fixes to confirm remaining state

evals.prompt: validate all markdown files in this project and provide a summary of formatting issues using the markdownlint skill
evals.expected_output: Comprehensive report of markdown issues across multiple files with rule references
expectations: Output scans multiple markdown files, not just one
Output categorizes or lists errors by rule ID or file
Output provides actionable fix guidance for each category of error
